body:
Elena, thanks for the note — it's been a while since we connected and I'm glad you reached out. I've been heads-down on a couple of new positions here at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital), mostly in the grid-edge software and AI inference infrastructure space, so the timing of your message actually caught me at an interesting moment. The deal you flagged sounds like it could sit squarely in the overlap between our two theses, which is exactly the kind of co-investment dynamic I've been wanting to explore with [Crossbeam Capital](orgs/crossbeam-capital) for a while now. Would love to jump on a call this week or next to dig into the specifics — I can do Thursday afternoon or anytime Friday if either of those work on your end. Let me know and we'll get something on the calendar.

Amara
